figures.caption: Table 1: Main results across 6 scenarios (0-100 Scale). OA: Overall Assessment Score; Logic: Logical Compliance Score; Chat: Conversational Quality Score. The superscripts indicate the ranking within Closed-Source and Open-Source groups, respectively. Format Error: Percentage of outputs failing JSON parsing. Chat Length: Average character count of the response field.
Figure 1: Service Agent SOP Example (Telecom Scenario).
Figure 2: Overview of SAGE evaluation framework.
Figure 10: Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for Six Industrial Scenarios.

Figure 6: Correlation analysis between the Chat Quality Score and its five sub-dimensions. The deviations from the regression lines (e.g., Doubao-Seed-1.8’s high Linguistic vs. low Instruction scores) highlight specific model characteristics.

Table 4: Sub-dimension Analysis: Average Performance Across All Models. Path: Path Correctness; Finals: Finals Correctness; Class.: Classification Accuracy; Ling.: Linguistic Quality; Anth.: Anthropomorphism; Cont.: Content Utility; Satis.: User Satisfaction; Instr.: Instruction Compliance (0-100 Scale).
Table 3: Adversarial Intensity Analysis: Average Performance Across All Models (0-100 Scale).
Table 2: Turn-by-Turn Performance Analysis by Scenario. (0-100 Scale).
